title: Frosted on Ice
description: A fresh icy-winter themed texture pack made for Hypixel Skyblock & Minecraft.
body:
### **Frosted on Ice ❄ is a resource pack built for PvP, Minecraft or Skyblock featuring**
### 
  ### For 1.8.9, 1.21.5, 1.21.8 and 1.21.10!
  

❄️ Menu guis

🧩 Very wide range of items & blocks

✨ Custom particles and glint effects

🌈 Custom blocks/items for Skyblock.

### Full list of all that is changed in 1.8.9:
###
<details>
<summary>1.8.9 Changelist</summary>
</details>



### Full list of all that is changed in 1.21:
### 

<details>
<summary>1.21 Changelist</summary>



</details>

### **This pack is best experienced with:**
### 
**- Complementary shaders (Unbound style) on medium profile (upping contrast and brightness helps also REMOVE FULLBRIGHT!!!)**
- OptiFine 1.8.9 (Not needed for the 1.21 versions) 
- Neu (for 1.8.9) / Frimament (for 1.21)
- Connected Textures enabled
- Custom Colors and Skybox enabled (optional but supported)

  
I would love to hear your feedback for the pack  💖

**If you want to use/change this pack and distribute it to anyone contact me via discord**

**To-do list:**
- Custom item models for skyblock.
- Re-color of the pack for a darker version to ease the toll on the eye.
- Re-color of the pack to many different colors.
- Much more
